svg.metadata:
{"type":"seqgraph","mermaid":"sequenceDiagram participant OG as Operation Graph participant BC as BeaconCoordinator
(server-side) participant B as Beacon
(remote) OG->>BC: beacon-dispatch (enqueue) Note left of OG: Returns WaitingForInput
(graph paused) B->>BC: poll loop BC->>B: assign work item B->>B: execute locally B->>BC: report result BC->>OG: resumeOperation() Note left of OG: Graph continues ","style":"notebook"}
